games.name: Trackmania (2020)
games.description: Current Trackmania release focused on time-trial racing on creator-made tracks, with Free, Standard, and Club access tiers.

games.name: TrackMania 2: Lagoon
games.description: Tropical island environment with aquatic shortcuts and high-speed straights. Fourth and final TrackMania 2 title on ManiaPlanet.

games.name: TrackMania Turbo
games.description: Console-focused entry with four environments: Rollercoaster Lagoon, International Stadium, Canyon Grand Drift, and Valley Down & Dirty, plus a co-op stunt mode.

games.name: TrackMania 2: Valley
games.description: Forested mountain roads, off-road terrain, and sweeping high-speed corners. Third TrackMania 2 title on ManiaPlanet.

games.name: TrackMania 2: Stadium
games.description: Free-to-play revival of the Nations/Forever Stadium environment on the ManiaPlanet engine.

games.name: ShootMania Storm
games.description: Arena shooter built on ManiaPlanet with elimination and team modes plus community modding support.

games.name: TrackMania 2: Canyon
games.description: ManiaPlanet launch title with canyon environments, drifting, and big air sections.

games.name: QuestMania
games.description: RPG/adventure spin-off on ManiaPlanet with exploration, puzzles, and Nadeo physics.

games.name: TrackMania Turbo
games.description: Spin-off for Nintendo DS and Wii with simplified turbo mechanics and handheld-oriented track design.

games.name: TrackMania: Build to Race
games.description: Track-building focused entry for Nintendo DS and Wii that lets players build and race their own courses.

games.name: TrackMania Nations Forever
games.description: Free follow-up to TM Nations ESWC with the Stadium environment and online multiplayer.

games.name: TrackMania United Forever
games.description: Updated TM United release with the six classic environments and improved online features.

games.name: TrackMania DS
games.description: Nintendo DS version of TrackMania with adapted tracks and a portable track editor.

games.name: TrackMania United
games.description: Bundles the six classic environments - Desert, Rally, Snow, Island, Bay, and Stadium - into one release.

games.name: TrackMania Nations ESWC
games.description: Free ESWC tie-in release with the Stadium environment and competitive multiplayer.

games.name: TrackMania Sunrise eXtreme
games.description: Expanded TrackMania Sunrise re-release with extra tracks, updated physics, and eXtreme mode.

games.name: TrackMania Original
games.description: Free re-release of the original 2003 TrackMania with the Desert and Rally environments.

games.name: TrackMania Sunrise
games.description: Second main entry with the Island and Bay environments, updated graphics, and stunt-focused play.

games.name: TrackMania: Power Up!
games.description: Expansion pack for the original TrackMania with new tracks, cars, and game modes.

games.name: TrackMania
games.description: Original TrackMania release focused on time-trial racing across the Desert and Rally environments.
